content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Xsolla: Full Stack Developer Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Montreal / Kuala Lumpur / Serbia / Baku / Remote </p> <div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>THE OPPORTUNITY:</b></div><div><br></div><div>Xsolla’s product for Creators provides a <a class="postings-link" href="https://x.la/xpn">full cohesive creative suite</a> to support their entire content creation journey, with monetisation/engagement tools as well as a central hub of opportunities to make money promoting publishers’ games. For publishers, we provide <a class="postings-link" href="https://xsolla.com/partner-network">advanced data reporting and campaign management tools</a>, to enable businesses to take a data-driven approach in promoting their latest games through content creators.</div><div><br></div><div>As a Full Stack Developer, you will work across our entire technology stack, from our React applications for creators and publishers, to the backend Node.js microservices that work to ingest data and provide our REST/gRPC APIs. You will tackle problems such as optimising queries against our large, complex database of creator data, and ensuring our systems scale to meet the demands of game launches from major publishers.</div><div><br></div><div>Our people are driven by curiosity, continual learning, good vibes, and strong opinions. We constantly reevaluate our past decisions to determine a better path forward. We’re proud to not only build truly amazing products but to build a company and culture we can be proud of. We are grateful for the rare opportunity to solve exceptionally hard problems with people we love and respect.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>RESPONSIBILITIES</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Execute full SDLC for solutions targeting business and consumer customers.</li><li>Work effectively in cross-functional teams to bring features and APIs to production.</li><li>Demonstrate strong leadership presence to inspire team members.</li><li>Comfortable with distributed systems and large datasets.</li><li>Prioritize automation for streamlined processes.</li><li>Passionate about building high-quality, innovative, and performant software.</li><li>Ensure compliance with observability best practices and technical design standards.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>REQUIREMENTS</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years experience in web application development</li><li>Professional experience with Node.js, React, MongoDB, and TypeScript</li><li>Experience with performance and optimization problems and a demonstrated ability to both diagnose and prevent these problems</li><li>A love for automated testing</li><li>Experience designing and operating distributed microservices in containerized environments</li><li>Proficient working experience with modern auth constructs such as JWT, Claims, OAuth 2.0</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>We get really excited about people that can meet one or more of the following:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience debugging specialized deep problems (e.g. browser incompatibilities, billing systems, memory leaks)</li><li>A passion for user experience design</li><li>Production storage or performance experience with time-series data</li><li>A love for object-oriented programming</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Bonus Round (Not required, but if it’s relevant let us know!)</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience with our current product management tools: Jira, Figma, G Suite, and Slack.</li><li>You love gaming and/or live streaming and are well versed in the language and needs of the community.</li><li>Measure what matters. You know how to write and measure OKRs (Objectives and Key Results)</li><li>Creator culture. You’ve worked on other products in or related to content creation.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>Benefits:</b></div><div>We are passionate about fostering a supportive environment for our team, so we prioritize the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of our employees and their families through a comprehensive Benefits Program. This includes 100% company-paid medical, dental, and vision plans, unlimited Flexible Time Off, and a personalized career roadmap for each employee. By investing in professional development through training and educational opportunities, we ensure that our team thrives both personally and professionally. Together, we’re not just building a business; we’re cultivating a community that values creativity, collaboration, and the transformative power of play.</div><div><br></div><div><b>About Xsolla:</b></div><div>Xsolla is a global video game commerce company with a robust and powerful set of tools and services designed specifically for the video game industry. Since its founding in 2005, Xsolla has helped thousands of game developers and publishers of all sizes fund, market, launch and monetize their games globally and across multiple platforms. As an innovative leader in in-game commerce, Xsolla’s mission is to solve the inherent complexities of global distribution, marketing, and monetization to help our partners reach more geographies, generate more revenue and create relationships with gamers worldwide. Xsolla is headquartered and incorporated in Los Angeles, California, with offices in Berlin, Seoul, and cities worldwide. Xsolla supports major gaming titles like Valve, Twitch, Roblox, Ubisoft, Epic Games, Take-Two, KRAFTON, Nexters, NetEase, Playstudios, Playrix, miHoYo, and more.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>For additional information and to learn more, please visit <a class="postings-link" href="http://xsolla.com">xsolla.com</a></div><div><br></div><div><b>Equal Employment Opportunity Statement:</b></div><div>Xsolla is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other characteristic protected by law. We consider qualified applicants with criminal histories in accordance with the Fair Chance Act.</div><div><br></div><div><b>Criminal History Consideration:</b></div><div>For the Full Stack Developer position, we will conduct a background check that may include:</div><div>- Criminal history check</div><div>- Employment verification</div><div>- Education verification</div><div>The background check is relevant to this position due to responsibilities such as a
